data.body:
So much for talking about my mixed feelings towards the ending of Chainsaw Man in a few days after it happened…

Be warned: this will be a thread.
data.author: did:plc:qvkjhllxskty6xwqqi2noxhv

data.body:
On one hand, the ending is deeply unsatisfying and underwhelming for many reasons with many plot threads and whatnot just dropped. Also, it kinda doesn’t really make any sense and comes out of nowhere.

Denji is robbed of his ability to make choices once again and Asa is robbed of her agency too.
data.author: did:plc:qvkjhllxskty6xwqqi2noxhv

data.body:
On the other hand, it’s also kind of a happy ending??? 

While I still continued to read Chainsaw Man and liked it, I will confess that as Denji’s personal life disappeared in Part 2, a lot of my enjoyment did as well. All I wanted him was for to be happy again and live a good life.
data.author: did:plc:qvkjhllxskty6xwqqi2noxhv

data.body:
In the end, Denji was reunited with some of his loved ones SOMEHOW and Asa too was spared misery. And I’m kinda ok with that? 

Also, it inspired a lot of memes, which is nice. 

Sorry for taking so long.
data.author: did:plc:qvkjhllxskty6xwqqi2noxhv
